title: Baby Pink Satin Ribbon 6mm Thin x 91m - Light Pink Gift Wrapping Ribbon for Wedding, Christmas & Crafts | Slim Decorative Ribbons for Present Wrapping, Cake, Hair Bows & Florist Decorations
features: 🎀【High-quality materials】Satin Ribbon made of high-quality fabric materials, it feels soft and delicate, and has a tough and durable texture. Whether it is used for handmade or gift packaging, it can show its excellent quality.

🎀【Pure color】Ribbon roll has a rich selection of pure colors, the colors are full and pure, without any mixed colors. Whether it is classic black, white, red, or fresh blue, green, and yellow, it can meet your needs for different occasions.

🎀【Multiple uses】Ribbon satin ribbon can be used to decorate gifts, make handicrafts, embellish clothing, etc. It can add a sense of refinement and beauty to your life, making ordinary items instantly unique.

🎀【Easy to cut and operate】Fabric ribbon has a moderate length and is easy to cut. The length can be adjusted at will according to your needs. At the same time, it is easy to bend and knot, and the operation is simple and convenient, even people without manual experience can easily get started.
🎀【Durable】After careful treatment, solid ribbons roll has good wear resistance and fading resistance. Even after long-term use and washing, it can still maintain its bright colors and good shape.
